title: Electrical Design Engineer / Asst. Electrical Design Engineer
description:
About Company:

Established in 1973, our client specializes in the design and manufacture of high-quality power distribution and control systems for global customers. With a fully integrated in-house facility, they cover ranging from design, production, testing, and servicing.

Job Description:

- Prepare material requisition lists for job requirements

- Plan and design electrical switchboards, consoles and control panels according to customer's requirements and company standards

- Prepare approval drawings, shop drawings, final drawings / documents, short circuit calculations, instruction manuals as required for submission to clients and shop floor production

- Co-ordinate with clients and consultants on the technical requirements. Attend technical discussions when required

- Feedback to Sales & Marketing Department on the changes of technical requirements by clients for claims of additional costs and time

- Check and follow-up on design and shop drawings with production departments

- Develop and improve on design of electrical switchboards, consoles and control panels. While taking note of quality, standard, cost effective designs

- Assist and advise Sales & Marketing Department on technical matters, provide technical backup for securing of contracts

- Carry out other responsibilities as and when assigned by the superiors

- Follow the procedures of design control, documentation and data control, and quality system of the total Quality Management System

Job Requirements:

- At least Diploma in Electric Engineering

- Candidate which possess engineering design experience will be an added advantage

- No experience are welcome to apply (entry level)

- Experience in Autocad & Solidwork

Compensation:

- Working location: Tuas, transport provided to/from company/MRT (BL/CCK/BB)

- Working hours: 5-days work week, 8.15am to 5.45pm

- 14 days annual leave

- 14 days medical leave

- AWS

- Variable bonus - depends on company & individual performance

- Full reimbursement of medical fees otherwise specified

- Cover under company’s group insurance scheme

- Lunch subsidy if order lunch internally
